metadata.description: The name of the existing User Assigned Managed Identity.
The resource group name where the existing UAMI lives.
Reference to an existing User Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI).
Index of the UAMI in `existingUserAssignedIdentities` whose principalId receives the role.
Role definition GUID to grant at Storage Account scope.
A (UAMI, role definition) pair generated for each role assignment iteration.
The Microsoft Entra principal (object) ID that receives the role.
Role definition GUID to grant at Storage Account scope.
A (principal object ID, role definition) pair generated for each service principal/user role assignment iteration.
The name of the scenario, used to derive resource names
The location for the resource group and Storage Account resources
Tags applied to all resources
The SKU name for the Storage Account
The kind for the Storage Account
The access tier for the Storage Account (StorageV2 only)
When true, enables hierarchical namespace (Data Lake Storage Gen2). StorageV2 only.
Public network access setting
When true, allows Shared Key (account key / SAS) authorization. Defaults to false for Entra ID-only access.
Blob containers to create. Each element: { name: string, publicAccess?: None|Blob|Container }
Queues to create. Each element: { name: string, metadata?: object }
Tables to create. Each element: { name: string }
File shares to create. Each element: { name: string, shareQuota?: int, accessTier?: TransactionOptimized|Hot|Cool }
Optional. Array of existing User Assigned Managed Identities (UAMI) to grant storage data permissions. Defaults to an empty array, in which case no UAMI is granted.
Optional. Array of object (principal) IDs of existing Microsoft Entra service principals to grant storage data permissions. Defaults to an empty array.
Optional. Array of object IDs of existing Microsoft Entra users to grant storage data permissions. Defaults to an empty array.
Role definition GUIDs assigned to every existing UAMI, service principal, and user at Storage Account scope.
Enable Azure Monitor based observability resources (Log Analytics workspace and diagnostic settings).
The name of the resource group
The Azure region where the resource group will be created
Tags applied to the resource group
The resource ID of the resource group
The name of the resource group
The location of the resource group
The name of the Storage Account. Must be 3-24 characters and lowercase alphanumeric.
The Azure region where the Storage Account will be created
Tags applied to the Storage Account
The SKU name for the Storage Account
The kind for the Storage Account
The access tier for the Storage Account (StorageV2 only)
When true, enables hierarchical namespace (Data Lake Storage Gen2). StorageV2 only.
Public network access setting
The minimum TLS version to enforce
When true, allows Shared Key (account key / SAS) authorization. Defaults to false for Entra ID-only access.
Network ACL default action. Defaults to Allow for generic templates; set Deny for locked-down deployments.
Blob containers to create. Each element: { name: string, publicAccess?: None|Blob|Container }
Queues to create. Each element: { name: string, metadata?: object }
Tables to create. Each element: { name: string }
File shares to create. Each element: { name: string, shareQuota?: int, accessTier?: TransactionOptimized|Hot|Cool }
Soft delete retention days for blob soft delete (1-365)
Soft delete retention days for container soft delete (1-365)
When true, enables blob versioning
When true, enables change feed on the default blob service
Soft delete retention days for file share soft delete (1-365)

variables.storageAccountProperties: [union(createObject('allowSharedKeyAccess', parameters('allowSharedKeyAccess'), 'defaultToOAuthAuthentication', true(), 'allowBlobPublicAccess', false(), 'allowCrossTenantReplication', false(), 'supportsHttpsTrafficOnly', true(), 'minimumTlsVersion', parameters('minimumTlsVersion'), 'publicNetworkAccess', parameters('publicNetworkAccess'), 'networkAcls', createObject('bypass', 'AzureServices', 'defaultAction', parameters('networkAclsDefaultAction'))), if(equals(parameters('kind'), 'StorageV2'), createObject('accessTier', parameters('accessTier'), 'isHnsEnabled', parameters('enableHierarchicalNamespace')), createObject()))]

metadata.description: The resource ID of the Storage Account
The name of the Storage Account
The primary endpoints of the Storage Account
The blob endpoint (empty when not available)
The queue endpoint (empty when not available)
The table endpoint (empty when not available)
The file endpoint (empty when not available)
The dfs endpoint (empty when not available)
The names of blob containers created
The names of queues created
The names of tables created
The names of file shares created
The name of the Log Analytics workspace
The Azure region where the Log Analytics workspace will be created
Tags applied to the Log Analytics workspace
The retention period (days) for workspace data
The resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace
The name of the Log Analytics workspace
The name of the diagnostic settings resource
The resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace destination
The name of the existing Azure AI Foundry (Cognitive Services) account that diagnostic settings will be applied to. Provide either this or targetServerName.
The name of the existing Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server that diagnostic settings will be applied to. Provide either this or targetAccountName.
The name of the existing Azure Storage Account that diagnostic settings will be applied to. When set, diagnostic settings are created at the storage sub-service scopes (blob/queue/table/file).
The storage sub-services to configure diagnostic settings for when targetStorageAccountName is set.
The diagnostic log settings to configure
The diagnostic metric settings to configure

variables.storageDiagnosticSettingIds: [concat(if(contains(parameters('storageServices'), 'blob'), createArray(coalesce(if(and(variables('useStorageTarget'), contains(parameters('storageServices'), 'blob')), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', if(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), parameters('targetStorageAccountName'), 'placeholder'), 'default'), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', parameters('name')), null()), '')), createArray()), if(contains(parameters('storageServices'), 'queue'), createArray(coalesce(if(and(variables('useStorageTarget'), contains(parameters('storageServices'), 'queue')), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/queueServices', if(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), parameters('targetStorageAccountName'), 'placeholder'), 'default'), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', parameters('name')), null()), '')), createArray()), if(contains(parameters('storageServices'), 'table'), createArray(coalesce(if(and(variables('useStorageTarget'), contains(parameters('storageServices'), 'table')), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/tableServices', if(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), parameters('targetStorageAccountName'), 'placeholder'), 'default'), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', parameters('name')), null()), '')), createArray()), if(contains(parameters('storageServices'), 'file'), createArray(coalesce(if(and(variables('useStorageTarget'), contains(parameters('storageServices'), 'file')), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/fileServices', if(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), parameters('targetStorageAccountName'), 'placeholder'), 'default'), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', parameters('name')), null()), '')), createArray()))]

metadata.description: The resource ID of the diagnostic settings resource

id.value: [coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(if(variables('useServerTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', if(not(empty(parameters('targetServerName'))), parameters('targetServerName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', parameters('name')), null()), if(variables('useAccountTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), parameters('targetAccountName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', parameters('name')), null())), variables('storageDiagnosticSettingId')), '')]

metadata.description: The name of the diagnostic settings resource

name.value: [coalesce(coalesce(if(variables('useServerTarget'), parameters('name'), null()), if(variables('useAccountTarget'), parameters('name'), null())), parameters('name'))]

metadata.description: The name of the target Azure AI Foundry (Cognitive Services) account resource. Provide either this or targetStorageAccountName.
The name of the target Azure Storage Account resource. Provide either this or targetAccountName.
The name of the target Azure Container Registry (ACR) resource. Provide either this or one of the other target*Name parameters.
The name of the target Azure Container App resource. Provide either this or one of the other target*Name parameters.
The principal ID that receives the role assignment
The fully qualified role definition resource ID
The principal type for the role assignment
Optional deterministic seed for role assignment name; when omitted, a deterministic name is generated

variables.roleAssignmentScopeName: [if(variables('useContainerAppTarget'), parameters('targetContainerAppName'), if(variables('useRegistryTarget'), parameters('targetRegistryName'), if(variables('useStorageTarget'), parameters('targetStorageAccountName'), parameters('targetAccountName'))))]

metadata.description: The resource ID of the role assignment

id.value: [coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(if(variables('useContainerAppTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.App/containerApps', if(not(empty(parameters('targetContainerAppName'))), parameters('targetContainerAppName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null()), if(variables('useRegistryTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', if(not(empty(parameters('targetRegistryName'))), parameters('targetRegistryName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null())), if(variables('useStorageTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', if(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), parameters('targetStorageAccountName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null())), if(variables('useAccountTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), parameters('targetAccountName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null())), '')]
